title: Israel, US continue to strike Iran 'with force'
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

01:48
summary: Terrified residents of Iran's capital described it as a ghost town on Tuesday, its streets largely emptied by a US-Israeli missile barrage apart from security checkpoints and Revolutionary Guards patrols ​that rove the city.
